evals.description: Standard query list with target domain tracking
assertions: Returns valid JSON without a top-level error field
results array contains one entry per input query (4 entries)
Each result has query, target_position (number or null), top_5_results, and serp_features fields
top_5_results contains up to 5 entries, each with domain, title_snippet, and is_ai_position fields
serp_features contains local_pack_present, featured_snippet_present, knowledge_panel_present, ai_overview_present, and people_also_ask_present booleans
summary object contains target_domain_visibility_rate, queries_with_ai_overview, and top_competitor_domains fields
target_domain_visibility_rate is a number between 0 and 1
Output contains no recommendations or editorial analysis

evals.description: Queries without target domain — target_position fields are null
assertions: Returns valid JSON without a top-level error field
target_position in each result is null (no target domain provided)
serp_features fields are still populated for each query

evals.description: Query list exceeding 15 — agent processes up to 15
assertions: results array contains no more than 15 entries (input cap enforced)
